dvids.title: U.S. Forces Complete New Strikes on Iranian Military Targets
dvids.desc: U.S. Central Command forces launch strikes in response to Iran's attack on commercial vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz. (U.S. Central Command Video)

dvids.title: U.S. Forces Complete New Strikes on Iranian Military Targets
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) completed the latest wave of strikes against Iran at 10:15 p.m. ET on July 13.

dvids.title: U.S. Forces to Resume Naval Blockade Against Iran
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — At the Commander in Chief's direction, U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) forces will resume blockading maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports on July 14 at 4 p.m. ET.

dvids.title: U.S. Sea Drones Strike Submarine and Ship Maintenance Facility in Iran
dvids.desc: Using multiple one-way attack surface drones, CENTCOM forces successfully struck a submarine and ship maintenance facility in Iran, July 12, 2026. Three Corsair unmanned surface vessels hit the port at Bandar Abbas Naval Base, marking the first time American forces have employed sea drones in combat

dvids.title: CENTCOM Completes Another Wave of Strikes Against Iran
dvids.desc: Video footage of U.S. Central Command forces striking Iranian military targets after launching aircraft and cruise missiles in response to Iran's attack on commercial vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz, released July 12, 2026. (U.S. Central Command Video)
